result.stderr:
DemNet Elevation API CLI Tool 1.3.2
Xavier Fischer

  3d               Create 3D model from Digital Elevation model and OSM tiles.
                   Freely accesible DEMs are SRTM_GL3, AW3D30, NASADEM.
                   Freely accessible imagery providers are : Esri, OpenTopoMap
                   MapBox, MapTiler and ThunderForest each requires an API token
                   from a freemium account.

  osm              Create 3D model from Digital Elevation model and OSM tiles.
                   This is experimental : use tilegen first with a small
                   .osm.pbf file and use the output directory as input for this
                   mode

  tilegen          Generate vector tiles from OSM.pbf file. A Nasa Earth Login
                   account is required to process elevation data. (register here
                   : https://urs.earthdata.nasa.gov/users/new)

  decimate         Decimates a GLB model using Quadric Error Metrics (QEM)

  show-config      Show configuration and app secrets

  update-config    Update configuration and app secrets

  help             Display more information on a specific command.

  version          Display version information.

commands.payload:
DemNet Elevation API CLI Tool 1.3.2
Xavier Fischer

  3d               Create 3D model from Digital Elevation model and OSM tiles.
                   Freely accesible DEMs are SRTM_GL3, AW3D30, NASADEM.
                   Freely accessible imagery providers are : Esri, OpenTopoMap
                   MapBox, MapTiler and ThunderForest each requires an API token
                   from a freemium account.

  osm              Create 3D model from Digital Elevation model and OSM tiles.
                   This is experimental : use tilegen first with a small
                   .osm.pbf file and use the output directory as input for this
                   mode

  tilegen          Generate vector tiles from OSM.pbf file. A Nasa Earth Login
                   account is required to process elevation data. (register here
                   : https://urs.earthdata.nasa.gov/users/new)

  decimate         Decimates a GLB model using Quadric Error Metrics (QEM)

  show-config      Show configuration and app secrets

  update-config    Update configuration and app secrets

  help             Display more information on a specific command.

  version          Display version information.

result.stderr:
DemNet Elevation API CLI Tool 1.3.2
Xavier Fischer
USAGE:
Generate model with OSM, without terrain:
  elevationapi decimate --input test.glb --output output.glb
Generate model with OSM, terrain and no texture:
  elevationapi decimate --input test.glb --output output.glb --quality 0.5

  -i, --input      Required. Input GLB file to decimate

  -o, --output     Required. Output GLB file

  -q, --quality    (Default: 0.5) Decimation factor (0 (max) -> 1 (no
                   decimation))

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.

result.stderr:
DemNet Elevation API CLI Tool 1.3.2
Xavier Fischer
USAGE:
Generate model with OSM, without terrain:
  elevationapi osm --input C:\Tiles --output C:\model.glb --wkt POLYGON((...))
Generate model with OSM, terrain and no texture:
  elevationapi osm --input C:\Tiles --multiplier 1.5 --output C:\model.glb
  --terrain --wkt POLYGON((...))
Generate model with OSM, terrain and OpenTopoMap texture:
  elevationapi osm --input C:\Tiles --output C:\model.glb --imagery OpenTopoMap
  --terrain --wkt POLYGON((...))
[Short syntax] Generate model with OSM, terrain, OpenTopoMap texture, for
buildings and highways:
  elevationapi osm -i C:\Tiles -l Buildings,Highways -m 1.5 -o C:\model.glb -p
  OpenTopoMap -t -w POLYGON((...))
[with None imagery provider]:
  elevationapi osm -i C:\Tiles -o C:\model.glb -t -w POLYGON((...))
[with Esri imagery provider]:
  elevationapi osm -i C:\Tiles -o C:\model.glb -p Esri -t -w POLYGON((...))
[with MapTilerSatellite imagery provider]:
  elevationapi osm -i C:\Tiles -o C:\model.glb -p MapTilerSatellite -t -w
  POLYGON((...))
[with MapBoxSatellite imagery provider]:
  elevationapi osm -i C:\Tiles -o C:\model.glb -p MapBoxSatellite -t -w
  POLYGON((...))
[with MapBoxSatelliteStreets imagery provider]:
  elevationapi osm -i C:\Tiles -o C:\model.glb -p MapBoxSatelliteStreets -t -w
  POLYGON((...))
[with MapBoxOutdoors imagery provider]:
  elevationapi osm -i C:\Tiles -o C:\model.glb -p MapBoxOutdoors -t -w
  POLYGON((...))
[with OpenTopoMap imagery provider]:
  elevationapi osm -i C:\Tiles -o C:\model.glb -p OpenTopoMap -t -w
  POLYGON((...))
[with ThunderForestOutdoors imagery provider]:
  elevationapi osm -i C:\Tiles -o C:\model.glb -p ThunderForestOutdoors -t -w
  POLYGON((...))
[with ThunderForestLandscape imagery provider]:
  elevationapi osm -i C:\Tiles -o C:\model.glb -p ThunderForestLandscape -t -w
  POLYGON((...))
[with ThunderForestNeighbourhood imagery provider]:
  elevationapi osm -i C:\Tiles -o C:\model.glb -p ThunderForestNeighbourhood -t
  -w POLYGON((...))
[with BingMapsSatellite imagery provider]:
  elevationapi osm -i C:\Tiles -o C:\model.glb -p BingMapsSatellite -t -w
  POLYGON((...))
[with SwissImage imagery provider]:
  elevationapi osm -i C:\Tiles -o C:\model.glb -p SwissImage -t -w
  POLYGON((...))
[with OrtoIGNfr imagery provider]:
  elevationapi osm -i C:\Tiles -o C:\model.glb -p OrtoIGNfr -t -w POLYGON((...))

  -i, --input         Required. FlatGeoBuf tiles directory

  -l, --layers        OSM layers to generate (separated by commas, without
                      spaces)

  -t, --terrain       Toggle terrain generation with model

  -w, --wkt           Required. Well Known Text (WKT) rectangle defining the
                      extent to generate

  -d, --dem           Required. Digital Elevation Model to use (SRTM_GL3,
                      SRTM_GL1, AW3D30, ASTER_GDEMV3, NASADEM)

  -s, --demsource     Custom data directory where Digital Elevation Model are
                      located. WARNING! This directory must contain this
                      strucutre: <directory>\DEM.Net\<datasetname> subirectory

  --srid              (Default: 4326) Override dataset SRID (find reference on
                      https://epsg.io

  -p, --imagery       (Default: None) Imagery provider for terrain texture

  -q, --quality       (Group: Texture quality) (Default: 15) Number of imagery
                      tiles per texture side. (4: low, 8: medium, 16: high, 32:
                      best)

  -z, --zoom          (Group: Texture quality) Imagery tiles zoom level (1 to
                      23). This will override 'quality' parameter

  -r, --resolution    (Group: Texture quality) Imagery texture required
                      resolution (example: 1280x1024 or 1024 for 1024x1024).
                      This will override 'quality' and 'zoom' parameter

  -o, --output        Required. Output model file path (.glb extension)

  -m, --multiplier    (Default: 1.5) Z exaggeration factor (0 is flat, 1.5 is
                      more realistic)

  --decimation        (Default: 0.5) Decimation factor (0 (max) -> 1 (no
                      decimation))

  --simulation        Simulates generation and estimates model size and other
                      metrics before generation.

  --heightmap-file    (Default: false) (Useful when low on RAM) Prevents the
                      warped heightmap file from being generated.

  --imagery-only      When specified, only imagery texture will be generated.

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.

USAGE:

  -i, --input         Required. FlatGeoBuf tiles directory

  -l, --layers        OSM layers to generate (separated by commas, without
                      spaces)

  -t, --terrain       Toggle terrain generation with model

  -w, --wkt           Required. Well Known Text (WKT) rectangle defining the
                      extent to generate

  -d, --dem           Required. Digital Elevation Model to use (SRTM_GL3,
                      SRTM_GL1, AW3D30, ASTER_GDEMV3, NASADEM)

  -s, --demsource     Custom data directory where Digital Elevation Model are
                      located. WARNING! This directory must contain this
                      strucutre: <directory>\DEM.Net\<datasetname> subirectory

  --srid              (Default: 4326) Override dataset SRID (find reference on
                      https://epsg.io

  -p, --imagery       (Default: None) Imagery provider for terrain texture

  -q, --quality       (Group: Texture quality) (Default: 15) Number of imagery
                      tiles per texture side. (4: low, 8: medium, 16: high, 32:
                      best)

  -z, --zoom          (Group: Texture quality) Imagery tiles zoom level (1 to
                      23). This will override 'quality' parameter

  -r, --resolution    (Group: Texture quality) Imagery texture required
                      resolution (example: 1280x1024 or 1024 for 1024x1024).
                      This will override 'quality' and 'zoom' parameter

  -o, --output        Required. Output model file path (.glb extension)

  -m, --multiplier    (Default: 1.5) Z exaggeration factor (0 is flat, 1.5 is
                      more realistic)

                      decimation))

  --simulation        Simulates generation and estimates model size and other
                      metrics before generation.

  --heightmap-file    (Default: false) (Useful when low on RAM) Prevents the
                      warped heightmap file from being generated.

  --imagery-only      When specified, only imagery texture will be generated.

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.

result.stderr:
DemNet Elevation API CLI Tool 1.3.2
Xavier Fischer
USAGE:
Generate tiles for ukraine-latest.osm.pbf file in C:\tiles directory:
  elevationapi tilegen --input ukraine-latest.osm.pbf --output C:\Tiles
Generate tiles for ukraine-latest.osm.pbf file in C:\tiles directory for
buildings and highways only:
  elevationapi tilegen --input ukraine-latest.osm.pbf --layers
  Buildings,Highways --output C:\Tiles
[Short syntax] Generate tiles for ukraine-latest.osm.pbf file in C:\tiles
directory for buildings only:
  elevationapi tilegen -i ukraine-latest.osm.pbf -l Buildings -o C:\Tiles

  -i, --input        Required. OSM protobuf file to process

  -o, --output       Required. Output directory path

  -l, --layers       (Default: Buildings Highways) OSM layers to extract
                     (separated by commas, without spaces)

  -e, --elevation    (Default: false) Compute elevations for all processed
                     features (NASADEM)

  -c, --check        (Default: false) Check tiles integrity by reading every
                     feature

  -r, --ram          (Default: 0.8) Max memory usage (0.5 = 50% of available
                     RAM, 0.8 = 80% of RAM)

  -d, --delete       (Default: false) True to delete existing tiles, false to
                     append to existing tiles

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.

staticCommands.name: 3d
staticCommands.description:
Create 3D model from Digital Elevation model and OSM tiles.
Freely accesible DEMs are SRTM_GL3, AW3D30, NASADEM.
Freely accessible imagery providers are : Esri, OpenTopoMap
MapBox, MapTiler and ThunderForest each requires an API token from a freemium account.

options.description: Digital Elevation Model to use (SRTM_GL3, SRTM_GL1, AW3D30, ASTER_GDEMV3, NASADEM)
Output model file path (.glb extension)
Well Known Text (WKT) rectangle defining the extent to generate
Decimation factor (0 (max) -> 1 (no decimation))
Custom data directory where Digital Elevation Model are located. WARNING! This directory must contain this strucutre: <directory>\DEM.Net\<datasetname> subirectory
(Useful when low on RAM) Prevents the warped heightmap file from being generated.
Imagery provider for terrain texture
When specified, only imagery texture will be generated.
Z exaggeration factor (0 is flat, 1.5 is more realistic)
Number of imagery tiles per texture side. (4: low, 8: medium, 16: high, 32: best)
Imagery texture required resolution (example: 1280x1024 or 1024 for 1024x1024). This will override 'quality' and 'zoom' parameter
Simulates generation and estimates model size and other metrics before generation.
Override dataset SRID (find reference on https://epsg.io
Imagery tiles zoom level (1 to 23). This will override 'quality' parameter

staticCommands.name: decimate
staticCommands.description: Decimates a GLB model using Quadric Error Metrics (QEM)

options.description: Input GLB file to decimate
Output GLB file
Decimation factor (0 (max) -> 1 (no decimation))

staticCommands.name: osm
staticCommands.description:
Create 3D model from Digital Elevation model and OSM tiles.
This is experimental : use tilegen first with a small .osm.pbf file and use the output directory as input for this mode

options.description: Digital Elevation Model to use (SRTM_GL3, SRTM_GL1, AW3D30, ASTER_GDEMV3, NASADEM)
FlatGeoBuf tiles directory
Output model file path (.glb extension)
Well Known Text (WKT) rectangle defining the extent to generate
Decimation factor (0 (max) -> 1 (no decimation))
Custom data directory where Digital Elevation Model are located. WARNING! This directory must contain this strucutre: <directory>\DEM.Net\<datasetname> subirectory
(Useful when low on RAM) Prevents the warped heightmap file from being generated.
Imagery provider for terrain texture
When specified, only imagery texture will be generated.
OSM layers to generate (separated by commas, without spaces)
Z exaggeration factor (0 is flat, 1.5 is more realistic)
Number of imagery tiles per texture side. (4: low, 8: medium, 16: high, 32: best)
Imagery texture required resolution (example: 1280x1024 or 1024 for 1024x1024). This will override 'quality' and 'zoom' parameter
Simulates generation and estimates model size and other metrics before generation.
Override dataset SRID (find reference on https://epsg.io
Toggle terrain generation with model
Imagery tiles zoom level (1 to 23). This will override 'quality' parameter

staticCommands.name: tilegen
staticCommands.description: Generate vector tiles from OSM.pbf file. A Nasa Earth Login account is required to process elevation data. (register here : https://urs.earthdata.nasa.gov/users/new)

options.description: OSM protobuf file to process
Output directory path
Check tiles integrity by reading every feature
True to delete existing tiles, false to append to existing tiles
Compute elevations for all processed features (NASADEM)
OSM layers to extract (separated by commas, without spaces)
Max memory usage (0.5 = 50% of available RAM, 0.8 = 80% of RAM)
Variable name (case sensitive !)
New value
